message:
feat: add replication sender, witness plane, and FTS5/MVCC refinements

crates/fsqlite-core/src/replication_sender.rs (+510 lines):
  New module implementing the networking-level replication sender for
  WAL-based log shipping, supporting framing, acknowledgements, and
  connection lifecycle management.

crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/witness_plane.rs (+67 lines):
  Geometric witness-plane abstraction for MVCC conflict detection,
  providing hyperplane-based consistency checks.

crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/witness_objects.rs, witness_refinement.rs,
ssi_abort_policy.rs:
  Refine witness validation logic and SSI abort policy decisions.

crates/fsqlite-ext-fts5/src/lib.rs:
  Iterative FTS5 improvements to tokenizer and query processing.

crates/fsqlite-vfs/src/windows.rs:
  New Windows VFS stub for cross-platform compilation support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
